case_title: MARSHA LONG-GREEN VS. SIEU MY TRAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,955.00 FILED BY LONG-GREEN, MARSHA AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, SIEU MY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LONG-GREEN, MARSHA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. WHETHER PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO A REFUND OF RENT FROM THE DEFENDANT IS SUBJECT TO THE ADMINISTRATIVE PROCESS OF THE SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY UNDER TITLE 24, CODE OF FEDERAL REGUALTIONS PART 982.509, PRIOR TO SEEKING A JUDICIAL REMEDY. PLAINTIFF MARSHA LONG-GREEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SIEU MY TRAN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/8/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED JUL-31-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, SIEU MY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-31-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-31-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MARSHA LONG-GREEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SIEU MY TRAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
